rationale: Review 2's point about mapsTo_fiber/symm is valid (the proofs genuinely generalize to any s : Set B with no added complexity), but its extension to fiberHomeomorph is questionable — that construction is inherently fiber-indexed in covering space theory, and generalization would require renaming and yields a less natural API. Acting on Review 2 improves the MapsTo lemmas but worsens fiberHomeomorph, leaving the PR at roughly the same quality as the approve path Review 1 recommends.
